titleStmt.title: SII 27.391: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 391. (A.R. No. 268 of 1931-32.) HOSĀLA, UDIPI TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: Broken slab set up in Yeḍatāruseṭṭi's hāḍe (jungle) at Chauḷikēri.
This fragmentary record registers a gift of land, made after purchase, to god Gōpīnathadēva by some persons. The details are all, however, lost.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
voṁduhāne vorave nāghaṁḍugadalu Akkimu 4 yi Akkiyanu kālakā
naḍasi koḍuvaṁtāgi Adahoṇe vāsudēvauruḷina maga nāraṇahuruḷi
basaviseṭṭikayyalu kaṁnaḍiga Aṁmaseṭṭimaga nāgiyya Ataṁmanuṁ yalataṁma cā
mi yi muvaru vopi tāu ho nāraṇaseṭi kayyalaruvāravāgi māḍida guṁḍumevoḷage
bāḷa catusīme vivara muḍa sālagaḍiyiṁ paḍu vahoḷegaḍiyiṁ baḍaga bīraṇaseṭigaḍi
yiṁ mūḍa nārasiṁha seṭimayyana gaḍiyiṁ teṁka yiṁtī catusīme voḷagāda gade hā 25 mane
ṭhāusaha ho nāraṇaseṭi kayya Aruvāravāgi koṁḍa vaga varahana kaḷada mē
laṇa Aḍakavanū Arthavanū Adhi yāgirisi gade varaha gadyāṇa 22 yo hoṁnige
di voḷa hāṁge voraveyakki nāghaṁḍugadalū A mu 4 yi Akkinū nāyara
Ayada nāraṇamayyanu naḍasi bahanu �yo Arthakke Ādahoṇe nāra
ṇaseṭṭi Aḷiya narasiṁhaseṭṭi Akki sikkidare Aruvārava mūḍisi ko
vanu mattaṁ basaviseṭṭi kayyalu ceḷiya kēriya Ayivaru halaru kellaṁ geṟe maṇi
gāṟa kēriyahalaru mattaṁ Ayappanāga
vāgi
yellada kayyalu Aruvāravāgi nā
Aṁṇukaluharanagaḍiyiṁ paḍuva gade hāne 50
halaragaḍiyiṁ paḍuva bagatina bhaṭṭanagaḍiyiṁ teṁkagade
50 mattaṁ bagetina bhaṭṭana magila maṇigāṟakēriya ha
lara (halara) gaḍiyiṁ paḍuva gade 55 mattaṁ saṁkara Upādhyana bāḷa gaḍina paḍuva gaddehāga 150
mu 1 kkaṁ hā 40 lu gadde mu 6 nu Ayyappa nāgṛge Aruvāravāgi yisida A
yiryi tegadu koṁḍa varaha ga 73 Akṣaradalū yepputtayeraḍu doḍḍavaraha
votadahāne vorave Akki nāghaḍugadalu halarahāne ha Akki mu 13
yi Akkiyanu kālakālake naḍasi bahaṁtāgi Āda hoṇemūrti bagatina bhaṭanamaga
ṇa bhaṭṭaru Aṟuvattu hāne gaddege baḍage kaṟeya nīru �yo Aṟuvokkala svāṁmyasaha
vāgi hālaru basaviseṭṭige koṭṭadu kruṣṇabāhiri madhyastana baraha Aṁtu śāsana 3
rada bāḷina voḷage śrī gōpināthadēvara vineyēgake biṭṭadu nayivēdyake ha mu 1 purāṇa
ke 3 hēḷidavage 12 naṁdādīptige maṭa Ara visa Eṁṇe ha 9 ka 0 A mu 71 dīvaḷigahabba di 2 ke suttataḷige
yeṁṇe mu 1 śrīgaṁdhakke mu 30 12 ke mu 1
hakemū . batti Āra hā pacāmru śivarātri 2
paṁcāmruta mu 27 paṁcaparva navarātri paramāna 1 jaga
hāne Akki Upāra sahamu 1 sūlahabba ba dararakke 53 mū 25
mū 25 vibūtigōpī ca
ṁdanake mu 11 vastrakke mu cautihōma 2 kke 2 Aṁttu Akki mu 52
naḍasidare yeraḍu
mu 5 Aṁtu dēvara vineyōga ke biṭa bāḷu pāraṁpaḷi bā caṁṇanāraṇahoḷa biyabāḷu
bage mu 10 mūlada bāḷu mu 11
saṁkaraseṭi bage mu 10 haṁdaṭina śaṁkharadēvara
dēvaru sāvaṁtana bage tuṁga bittu mu 2
dharṁmakke Uṁḍa brāhmaraja 12 kke
Digital edition of SII 27.391 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
